know-beget.claim: Three independent vocabularies name perception-closes-into-production as one operation.

kin-line-and-rule.claim: Beget-line and political legitimacy fuse into ruler-morphemes across languages.

year-cycle.claim: Four independent languages name the year as a returning-cycle morpheme.

moon-month.claim: The moon-body and the month-unit share one morpheme across four unrelated families — the cycle IS the clock.

sky-god.claim: Four unrelated languages fuse sky and divine into one morpheme.

earth-human.claim: PIE named earth and human-being from one root — the body IS named from the ground it stands on.

light-dark-axis.claim: Light and dark are two poles of one axis, not two separate things.

rotation-primitive.claim: The loop is named independently across motion, cognition, craft, and time.

tree-firm-true.claim: PIE *deru- named wood, firmness, and truth as one substrate operation — stays-pointing-the-same-way across three scales.

water-primitive.claim: The liquid-substance named independently across four families as the life-giving primitive.

fire-primitive.claim: Two PIE fire-roots (one for passive, one for agent-fire) show the dual-aspect of the same coord.

kinship-mother-pair.claim: Mother and father words arrive at the same sound-shape independently across unrelated families — the ma/pa phonemes are infant body-reaches, not culturally transmitted.
